description: The ancient architectural complex from the Ming and Qing dynasties, now part of the Zhengzhou Museum Confucian Temple section, showcasing ancient educational culture.
A renowned comprehensive shopping center in Zhengzhou, offering a wide range of brands and integrated shopping and dining experiences.
The central scenic lake of the CBD in Zhengdong New District, famous for its nighttime light shows.
A specialized museum fully showcasing the history and culture of Yellow River management.
An ecological wetland park in Zhengdong New District, featuring beautiful surroundings, ideal for leisure walks and sightseeing.
A large cultural theme park on the southern bank of the Yellow River, offering elevated views of the river and an immersive experience of Yellow River culture.
A landmark square in downtown Zhengzhou, with the Erqi Memorial Tower as an iconic architectural symbol of the city.
One of China's first national first-class museums, showcasing the finest of Central Plains culture with an extensive collection.
A modernly designed comprehensive museum featuring cultural exhibitions focused on Zhengzhou's local history and culture.
The ruins of the Shang Dynasty capital from 3600 years ago, the earliest existing ancient city walls in China.
